comments_made.comment: Noted PR #1418 merged, NDE fix in main, suggested closure
Redundant (fixed by #1418) + merge conflict; recommend closure
Found TAGS env var crash in conf.py; fix PR submitted
Noted overlap with RA #1533 + additional distance_matching fix; suggested regression test
Noted external data dep, docs indexing, CI skip needs
Summarized Polars support status; noted stale PR #1332; suggested thin interchange-protocol wrapper as Option A
Not a bug - confirmed by contributor; suggested closing
Resolved - upgrading DoWhy version fixes numpy.dual; suggested closing
Welcomed TasfinMahmud; noted overlap with stale RA PRs #1475/#1508/#1526; recommended this over stale RA PRs
DCO failing (commit 5159d332e missing Signed-off-by); noted superseded by new fresh PR; suggest close
Acknowledged @kf-rahman bug fix incorporated in PR #1432; PR merged with main and ready for review
Acknowledged @immu4989 PR comparison analysis; described improvements pushed to #1527
Recommended closure - superseded by #1563, has 5 merge conflicts

Explained CI failure root cause (pre-existing interpreter test bug, CamelCase vs snake_case); noted @immu4989's recommendation of #1495 as preferred fix for #1335; noted PR #1573 fixes the interpreter lookup
Informed @kevinchiv that contributor PR #1563 (TasfinMahmud) directly fixes the distance_metric_params bug
CI now fully green (all 30 build jobs passed) after #1573 merged; reminded emrekiciman of his commitment to merge
Reviewed type-assertion tests; clean and correct
